heading: Retroactive payment of pay and allowances delayed by administrative error or oversight
label: 2765 Retroactive payment of pay and allowances delayed by administrative error or oversight
text: Under regulations prescribed by the Secretary, the Coast Guard may authorize retroactive payment of pay and allowances, including selective reenlistment bonuses, to enlisted members if entitlement to the pay and allowances was delayed in vesting solely because of an administrative error or oversight.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 513 of this title
amendments: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 513 of this title
